mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamOathMapper.list 설 명 : 시험 서약서 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.TKEXAM_OATH_ID AS oathCd , A.CRS_SMSTR_ID AS termCd , A.ORG_ID AS orgId , A.DGRS_YR AS haksaYear , A.DGRS_SMSTR AS haksaTerm , A.USER_ID AS userId , A.MID_EXAM_OATHYN AS midOath , A.END_OATH AS endOath , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_OATH AS A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd}
